info.name: SAM Backend API
info.description:
Complete API collection for SAM (Salon Management) Backend

⚠️ ACCESS CONTROL NOTES:
- CUSTOMER role CANNOT access Subscription Plans APIs
- STAFF role CANNOT access Subscription Plans APIs (SUPER_ADMIN/ADMIN only)
- CUSTOMER role CANNOT access Salon Subscription APIs
- CUSTOMER role can only VIEW invoices and payments (not CREATE)
- Salon subscription endpoints require ADMIN role
- Invoice payment creation requires ADMIN or STAFF role

item.name: List Services
item.description: ADMIN/STAFF: Returns all services (active & inactive). CUSTOMER: Returns only active services.

item.name: List Services (Filtered by Status)
item.description: ADMIN/STAFF only: Filter services by status (ACTIVE or INACTIVE). CUSTOMER: Status param ignored, only sees active.

item.name: List Packages
item.description: ADMIN/STAFF: Returns all packages (active & inactive). CUSTOMER: Returns only active packages.

item.name: List Packages (Filtered by Status)
item.description: ADMIN/STAFF only: Filter packages by status (ACTIVE or INACTIVE). CUSTOMER: Status param ignored, only sees active.

item.name: Process Incentive Payout
item.description: Record payment for incentive. Note: staff_id is auto-filled from incentive record.

item.name: Create Product
item.description: Access: ADMIN, STAFF. Creates new product with initial stock record.

item.name: Update Product
item.description: Access: ADMIN, STAFF. Updates product information.

item.name: List Products
item.description: Access: ADMIN, STAFF. Retrieves all products with stock levels.

item.name: View Product
item.description: Access: ADMIN, STAFF. Retrieves product with stock information.

item.name: Update Stock Levels
item.description: Access: ADMIN, STAFF. Updates product stock quantities.

item.name: Get All Stock Levels
item.description: Access: ADMIN, STAFF. Retrieves stock levels with status indicators (LOW, OVERSTOCKED, OK).

item.name: Get Low Stock Alerts
item.description: Access: ADMIN, STAFF. Retrieves products below minimum quantity.

item.name: Create Stock Transaction (IN)
item.description: Access: ADMIN, STAFF. Records stock IN transaction and updates quantity.

item.name: Create Stock Transaction (OUT)
item.description: Access: ADMIN, STAFF. Records stock OUT transaction and updates quantity.

item.name: List Stock Transactions
item.description: Access: ADMIN, STAFF. Retrieves stock transaction history.

item.name: View Stock Transaction
item.description: Access: ADMIN, STAFF. Retrieves single transaction details.

item.name: Update Appointment
item.description: Update appointment details. All fields are optional. customer_id must exist in same salon.

item.name: Add/Update Service in Appointment
item.description: Adds service to appointment if not exists, updates if exists (upsert)

item.name: Update Appointment Service
item.description: Updates existing service details in appointment

item.name: Remove Service from Appointment
item.description: Removes service from appointment and recalculates total amount

item.name: Add Package to Appointment
item.description: Adds package to existing appointment

item.name: Update Package in Appointment
item.description: Updates package price/discount in appointment

item.name: Remove Package from Appointment
item.description: Removes package from appointment and recalculates total amount

item.name: Generate Invoice from Appointment
item.description: Creates customer invoice from completed appointment

item.name: 📋 SUBSCRIPTION PLANS
item.description: ⚠️ ACCESS: SUPER_ADMIN (full access), ADMIN (read-only) - STAFF and CUSTOMER roles CANNOT access these endpoints

item.name: 🏬 SALON SUBSCRIPTIONS
item.description: ⚠️ ACCESS: SUPER_ADMIN (any salon), ADMIN (own salon only) - STAFF and CUSTOMER roles CANNOT access

item.name: Cancel Salon Subscription
item.description: SUPER_ADMIN can cancel any subscription. ADMIN can only cancel own salon's subscription.

item.name: 🧾 CUSTOMER INVOICE PAYMENTS
item.description: ⚠️ ACCESS: POST requires ADMIN/STAFF - CUSTOMER can only GET (view) payments for own invoices

item.name: Create Salon
item.description: Creates a new salon and auto-generates admin user credentials. Optional fields: admin_username, admin_email, admin_password

item.name: 👥 ADMIN - USERS
item.description: User management endpoints. Access: SUPER_ADMIN (all salons), ADMIN (own salon only). NOTE: Staff management uses STAFF module endpoints.

item.name: Create Salon Admin
item.description: SUPER_ADMIN only: Creates admin user for existing salon

item.name: List Users by Salon
item.description: SUPER_ADMIN (any salon) or ADMIN (own salon only). salon_id in URL must match JWT token for ADMIN.

query.description: Filter by status: ACTIVE | INACTIVE | BLOCKED

item.name: View User Details
item.description: SUPER_ADMIN (any user) or ADMIN (own salon users only). STAFF should use Staff module instead.

item.name: Update User
item.description: SUPER_ADMIN (any user, all fields) or ADMIN (own salon, username/email only - NO status)

item.name: Toggle User Status
item.description: SUPER_ADMIN only. ADMIN cannot change user status. Cannot toggle self.

item.name: List All Subscriptions (All Salons)
item.description: SUPER_ADMIN only: Retrieves all subscriptions across all salons with filters (no pagination)

item.name: Generate Subscription Invoice
item.description: Generates invoice for salon subscription billing. Frontend calculates amounts based on plan type (flat/per-appointment/percentage), backend stores the invoice. Returns 409 if invoice already exists for same subscription + billing month.

item.name: Generate Salon Invoice
item.description: Creates new invoice or updates existing one (UPSERT). Returns 201 for create, 200 for update.

exec: // Check if invoice was created or updated

item.name: Sales Report
item.description: SUPER_ADMIN: Add ?salon_id=1 for specific salon, or omit for platform-wide. Response includes 'scope': 'platform' or 'salon'.

item.name: Sales Report (Platform-wide - SUPER_ADMIN)
item.description: SUPER_ADMIN only: Returns platform-wide sales data across ALL salons. Response includes 'scope': 'platform'.

item.name: Sales Report (Specific Salon - SUPER_ADMIN)
item.description: SUPER_ADMIN only: Returns sales data for specific salon. Response includes 'scope': 'salon'.

item.name: Appointment Report
item.description: SUPER_ADMIN: Add ?salon_id=1 for specific salon, or omit for platform-wide.

item.name: Appointment Report (Platform-wide - SUPER_ADMIN)
item.description: SUPER_ADMIN only: Returns platform-wide appointment data across ALL salons.

item.name: Staff Performance Report
item.description: ADMIN/STAFF only: Salon-level report.

item.name: Service-wise Revenue Report
item.description: SUPER_ADMIN: Add ?salon_id=1 for specific salon, or omit for platform-wide.

item.name: Service-wise Revenue (Platform-wide - SUPER_ADMIN)
item.description: SUPER_ADMIN only: Returns platform-wide service revenue data.

item.name: Package-wise Revenue Report
item.description: SUPER_ADMIN: Add ?salon_id=1 for specific salon, or omit for platform-wide.

item.name: Package-wise Revenue (Platform-wide - SUPER_ADMIN)
item.description: SUPER_ADMIN only: Returns platform-wide package revenue data.

item.name: Tax Report (GST)
item.description: SUPER_ADMIN: Add ?salon_id=1 for specific salon, or omit for platform-wide.

item.name: Tax Report (GST) - Platform-wide (SUPER_ADMIN)
item.description: SUPER_ADMIN only: Returns platform-wide tax (GST) data across ALL salons. Response includes 'scope': 'platform'.
